description: A junior associate needs to read a 200-page deposition transcript and prepare a summary for the lead attorney.

expected_outcome.value: Agent has the full text of the transcript.

nodes.task_description: Identify and extract key testimony related to the central themes of the case.

expected_outcome.value: Agent pulls out the most important questions and answers.

nodes.task_description: Create a chronological or topic-based summary of the testimony, including page and line numbers for key admissions.

expected_outcome.value: Agent produces a well-organized, accurate summary that is easy to navigate.
